pageContext.name: Godzilla 1995
pageContext.description: Even the mighty Godzilla has its limits, and exposure to the high-purity uranium deposits on Birth Island and the resulting fission reaction has Godzilla looking more than just hot under the collar! Measuring 8 tall, 4.5 wide, and a monstrous 14 long to the tip of its tail, this highly articulated Toho ULTIMATES! figure of Godzilla is inspired by the 1995 film Godzilla vs. Destoroyah. Including interchangeable heads & hands and smoke effect accessories, this is one hot-looking Godzilla figure!
